# jsdoc-jibo

Jibo-themed template for [JSDoc](http://usejsdoc.org/).

## Usage

Requires a JSDoc configuration as well as some NPM scripts to generate the documentation.

### jsdoc.conf.json

Note that the markdown plugin is required for converting any code samples or markdown within any of your JSDoc comment blocks.

```json
{
    "source": {
        "include": [
            "./src/"
        ]
    },
    "plugins": [
        "plugins/markdown"
    ],
    "opts": {
        "recurse"       : true,
        "private"       : false,
        "lenient"       : false,
        "destination"   : "./docs",
        "template"      : "./node_modules/jsdoc-jibo"
    }
}
```

### package.json

Setting up NPM scripts makes it easy to create documentation and push that document to ghe **gh-pages** branch of your repository. 

```json
{
    "scripts": {
        "docs": "jsdoc -c jsdoc.conf.json -R README.md",
        "clean": "rimraf docs || exit 0",
        "predeploy": "npm run clean && npm run docs",
        "deploy": "gh-pages -d docs"
    },
    "devDependencies": {
        "jsdoc-jibo": "^1.0.0",
        "jsdoc": "^3.4.0",
        "gh-pages": "^0.11.0",
        "rimraf": 
    }
}
```
